summary: Iteration 39: Verified dynamic branding extension to ALL inner screens. Backend APIs working (health, login, tenants). Frontend login/dashboard working. Code review of 45 mobile screen files confirmed correct useTenant() implementation with proper import paths and hook placement.

login_endpoint.notes: Returns access_token, user, tenant with branding data

tenants_endpoint.notes: Returns tenants with branding data (primary_color, secondary_color)

frontend_login_page.notes: Login page loads correctly with Quadley branding

frontend_login_flow.notes: Login with gen@quadley.com / Quadley2025! redirects to /dashboard

code_review_mobile_branding.primaryColor_derivation: const { branding } = useTenant(); const primaryColor = branding?.primaryColor || '#3b82f6';
code_review_mobile_branding.InviteCodeScreen_note: Uses tenant_primary_color from invite API response (correct - user not yet authenticated with tenant)

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: All 45 mobile screen files have correct import path (../../contexts/TenantContext)
PASS: useTenant() hook called inside component function (not at module level)
PASS: primaryColor derived from branding?.primaryColor with '#3b82f6' fallback
PASS: TenantContext normalizeBranding handles snake_case to camelCase conversion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 extended P0 tenant color fix to ALL inner screens (45 mobile files). All screens use useTenant() hook for runtime branding. Backend branding APIs and web frontend login flow verified working.
